page.content: In the Asia-Pacific professional report for Vonovia SE as of January 2024, the occupancy rates overview reveals that in the Residential property type, there are 5,000 total units, 4,800 occupied units, resulting in an occupancy rate of 96.0%. The Commercial property type shows 3,000 total units, 2,700 occupied units, with an occupancy rate of 90.0%. The Industrial property type has 1,500 total units and 1,400 occupied units, leading to a 93.3% occupancy rate.

page.content: Retail consists of 2,000 total units, 1,600 occupied units, giving an occupancy rate of 80.0%. Hospitality has 1,200 total units with 900 occupied, resulting in a 75.0% occupancy rate. page.content: Co-working properties total 600 units, with 550 occupied, achieving an occupancy rate of 91.7%. The overall total shows 15,500 units, 13,450 occupied, yielding an overall occupancy rate of 86.7%. The average for the previous year occupancy rates for Residential was 95.5%, Commercial 89.0%, Industrial 92.0%, Retail 78.0%, Hospitality 76.0%, and Mixed-Use 85.0%. In terms of property disposition metrics, ResidentialProperties have a P/E Ratio of 15.3, Current Ratio of 1.5, Debt/Equity ratio of 0.8, Net Profit Margin of 12.5%, Return on Assets of 6.2%, Return on Equity of 9.1%, Sales Growth of 3.3, and Asset Turnover of 1.4. CommercialProperties exhibit a P/E Ratio of 17.8, Current Ratio of 1.2, Debt/Equity ratio of 1.1, Net Profit Margin of 14.3%, Return on Assets of 5.9%, Return on Equity of 8.4%, Sales Growth of 4.0, and Asset Turnover of 1.4. Mixed-UseProperties feature a P/E Ratio of 14.5, Current Ratio of 1.3, Debt/Equity ratio of 0.9, Net Profit Margin of 13.7%, Return on Assets of 7.0%, Return on Equity of 10.0%, Sales Growth of 2.7, and Asset Turnover of 1.4. The TotalDispositions have a P/E Ratio of 16.0, Current Ratio of 1.4, Debt/Equity ratio of 0.9, Net Profit Margin of 13.9%, Return on Assets of 6.5%, Return on Equity of 9.6%, Sales Growth of 3.5, and Asset Turnover of 1.4. The Market Cap is reported at 150B INR, with Total Debt of 60B INR and Equity at 90B INR, indicating an investment grade and stable growth.
